headline: Costco makes payment change that could speed up checkout for members

headline: COST Stock Retreats After Hours On Decelerating Comparable Sales After Strong May Performance
summary: Costco reported net sales of $29.24 billion for the five weeks ended July 5, 2026, a 10.6% increase from $26.44 billion a year earlier.

headline: Popular snack brand closes plant, cuts 345 jobs
summary: Food manufacturing companies continue to grow even as the jobs behind familiar grocery products shift. headline: Costco (COST) Launches Digital Wallet To Speed Up In Store Checkout
summary: Costco Wholesale has rolled out a new digital wallet feature in its mobile app. The tool lets members link any Visa card for quicker in store checkout. This launch represents a material update to Costco's digital member experience. For investors watching Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST), the digital wallet launch comes as the stock trades around $953.13 per share, with a return of 3.1% over the past week and 11.5% year to date. The company also shows very large multi year share price gains...
